hypothesis: Incorporating a synthesizability-aware feedback signal derived from LLM-extracted reaction pathway knowledge into MatAgent's iterative refinement loop will yield compositions that achieve simultaneously high formation energy targeting accuracy and experimentally realizable synthesis routes, such that the fraction of proposed novel materials predicted synthesizable by established thermodynamic criteria will exceed that of purely property-optimized generation by at least 30 percentage points, because the LLM's natural language reasoning can encode conditional synthesis constraints—such as precursor availability, reaction temperature windows, and phase stability under ambient conditions—that diffusion-based structure generators and GNN property predictors alone cannot capture.
